legal.error_must_accept: You must accept the terms to continue.
legal.disclaimer_point1_title: Michi is a Pure Information Intermediary
legal.disclaimer_point1_desc: Michi does not participate in any transactions. We do not process payments, arrange shipping, verify product quality, or provide transaction guarantees.
legal.disclaimer_point2_desc: Your agreement with any proxy shopper is entirely private. Michi is not a party to any agreement between you and a proxy shopper.
legal.disclaimer_point3_title: Michi Does Not Guarantee Proxy Shopper Trustworthiness
legal.disclaimer_point3_desc: Our verification confirms identity and Japan residence only. We do NOT verify professional competence, honesty, reliability, or service quality.
legal.disclaimer_point4_desc: You accept full risk of fraud, non-delivery, counterfeit products, shipping loss, and any other transaction problems. Michi will not refund or compensate you.
legal.disclaimer_point5_desc: If a proxy shopper does not deliver or disappears, Michi cannot help. You must resolve disputes directly with the proxy shopper or contact law enforcement.
legal.jurisdiction_us: United States: You agree that Michi is protected under Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act as an information intermediary.
legal.jurisdiction_hk: Hong Kong: Under Hong Kong supply of services law, Michi commits to reasonable care but you accept all transaction risks.
legal.jurisdiction_jp: Japan: Under Japan's Consumer Contract Act, Michi's responsibility is limited to providing verified information.
legal.jurisdiction_other: Multiple Jurisdictions: Michi is an information intermediary and you assume all transaction risks.
legal.full_terms_intro: For the complete terms of service, please review
legal.buyer_warning_title: Before You Contact a Proxy Shopper - Understand These Risks
legal.buyer_warning_1_desc: Any agreement you make with a proxy shopper is entirely private. Michi does not monitor or intervene in your communications.
legal.buyer_warning_2_desc: Even though the proxy shopper is identity-verified, they could still commit fraud, fail to deliver, or disappear.
legal.buyer_warning_3_desc: Before paying, verify the proxy shopper through video call, Instagram/TikTok history, and online reviews outside Michi.
legal.buyer_warning_4_desc: Michi recommends NO specific payment method. Common safer options:
legal.buyer_warning_4_option3: Staged payments (pay for items already received)
legal.buyer_warning_5_desc: Michi cannot help. Your options are:
legal.buyer_warning_5_option1: Request chargeback from your payment provider
legal.buyer_warning_5_option2: Report fraud to local law enforcement
legal.buyer_warning_5_option3: Report to Japan Consumer Affairs Agency
legal.payment_safety_desc: Do NOT send money to Michi company accounts. All payments go directly to the proxy shopper.
legal.confirmation_summary_1: Michi is a pure information intermediary with no payment processing or transaction guarantees
legal.confirmation_summary_2: All transaction risks are your responsibility
legal.confirmation_summary_3: Michi cannot mediate disputes, provide refunds, or help if things go wrong
legal.confirmation_summary_4: You have read and understand this agreement and accept all risks
legal.final_confirm_strong: I have read and fully understand
legal.final_confirm_point1: Michi is a pure intermediary and does not participate in transactions
legal.final_confirm_point2: All transaction risks are my responsibility
legal.final_confirm_point3: Michi will not refund me or help with disputes
legal.final_confirm_point4: I will not hold Michi liable for proxy shopper actions
legal.final_confirm_point5: I understand this agreement is legally binding
legal.final_audit_notice: This agreement is recorded in Michi audit log for legal verification.
legal.error_consent_failed: Failed to record your consent. Please try again.
legal.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
legal.success_terms_accepted: Thank you. You have accepted Michi terms of service.

privacy.intro: Michi is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.section1_1_desc: When you register an account, we collect information you provide such as name, email, phone number, and address.
privacy.section1_2_desc: When you use our platform, we automatically collect IP address, device type, browser type, access time, and page traffic through cookies.
privacy.section1_3_desc: We may collect information from payment processors and identity verification providers to verify your identity and process transactions.
privacy.section1_4_desc: For legal defense purposes, we record detailed information of all user consents, transactions, and disputes including timestamp, IP address, and user agent.
privacy.section2_point1: Provide and improve our services, including proxy shopper verification and transaction facilitation
privacy.section2_point2: Comply with legal and regulatory requirements including anti-money laundering and know-your-customer policies
privacy.section2_point3: Prevent fraud and abuse and maintain platform security
privacy.section2_point4: Record audit logs for legal defense and dispute resolution
privacy.section2_point5: Send notifications and updates (only with your consent)
privacy.section3_intro: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information including SSL encryption, secure servers, and limited access.
privacy.section3_warning: Important: No transmission method or electronic storage is 100% secure. You assume the risk for any information sent over the internet.
privacy.section4_right1_desc: You have the right to access the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.section4_right2_desc: You have the right to correct any inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
privacy.section4_right3_desc: In certain circumstances, you can request deletion of your personal data.
privacy.section4_right4_desc: You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used format.
privacy.section4_right5_desc: You can withdraw consent for data processing at any time.
privacy.section4_footer: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the contact information provided below.
privacy.section5_desc: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your user experience. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.section5_essential_desc: These are required for platform functionality and cannot be disabled.
privacy.section5_analytics_desc: These help us understand how users use our services.
privacy.section5_marketing_desc: These are used to deliver personalized advertisements. You can opt out.
privacy.section6_intro: We do not sell your personal data to third parties without consent. However, we may share information in these cases:
privacy.section6_point1: Compliance with legal obligations or legal process (court orders, subpoenas)
privacy.section6_point2: Service providers (payment processors, hosting providers) - bound by confidentiality agreements
privacy.section6_point3: Business transfers (merger, acquisition) - new entity bound by this policy
privacy.section6_point4: Aggregated data (anonymous non-personally identifiable information) for research and analysis
privacy.section7_desc: The length of time we retain your personal data depends on its purpose. Audit logs and transaction records are retained for 7 years for legal compliance purposes.
privacy.section8_us_desc: If you are a California resident, you have the right to request disclosure, deletion, and opt-out rights.
privacy.section8_hk_desc: We are committed to protecting your personal data under Hong Kong law. You have the right to access and correct your data.
privacy.section8_eu_desc: If you are located in the EU, GDPR regulations apply. You have full data subject rights.
privacy.section8_jp_desc: We handle personal information transparently in accordance with Japan's Personal Information Protection Act.
privacy.section9_intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your rights, please contact us:
privacy.section10_desc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will update the 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page. Continued use of our services means you accept the updated policy.
privacy.confirmation: This Privacy Policy is effective and complies with international privacy standards. Michi is committed to protecting your privacy rights.

terms.notice_content: Michi is a pure information intermediary platform. We do not participate in transactions, do not process payments, and do not provide guarantees. By using Michi, you agree to assume full responsibility for all transaction risks.
terms.section1_content: By accessing or using Michi, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.section2_intro: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to use our services provided that:
terms.section2_point1: You are at least 18 years old
terms.section2_point2: You comply with all applicable laws and regulations
terms.section2_point3: You will not use it for any illegal purposes
terms.section2_point4: You agree to all conditions in these terms
terms.section3_intro: As a buyer, you are responsible for:
terms.section3_point1: Verifying the proxy shopper's identity and reputation
terms.section3_point4: Complying with all applicable laws (import, taxes, etc.)
terms.section4_intro: As a proxy shopper, you are responsible for:
terms.section4_point3: Complying with Michi's Code of Conduct
terms.section4_point4: Responding to buyers through the contact information you provided
terms.section5_intro: Michi does not process any payments. All payments should:
terms.section5_point1: Be made directly between buyer and proxy shopper
terms.section5_point2: Be made through secure third-party payment methods (PayPal, credit card, bank transfer)
terms.section5_point3: NOT be sent to Michi company accounts
terms.section6_critical: Michi expressly disclaims all express and implied warranties.
terms.section6_content: We do not warrant the merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of our services.
terms.section7_critical: Michi and all its owners, employees, and agents are not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages.
terms.section7_content: Even if advised of the possibility of such damages, Michi is not liable.
terms.section8_point1: Send false information or impersonate others
terms.section8_point3: Send spam or harass other users
terms.section8_point5: Attempt to hack or damage the platform
terms.section9_step1_desc: Attempt to resolve issues directly with the proxy shopper or buyer before escalating.
terms.section9_step2_desc: If direct resolution fails, contact your payment provider (PayPal, bank, etc.) to open a dispute.
terms.section9_step3_desc: If fraud is involved, report to your local law enforcement or the National Police Agency if the seller is in Japan.
terms.section10_intro: These terms are governed by the following laws depending on your location:
terms.section10_us_desc: Governed by United States law and the laws of the State of New York.
terms.section10_hk_desc: Governed by the laws of Hong Kong.
terms.section10_jp_desc: Governed by the laws of Japan.
terms.section11_content: Michi may terminate your account at any time without notice if you violate these terms.
terms.section12_content: We may revise these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service means you accept the revisions.
terms.section13_intro: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us:
terms.legal_statement: These Terms of Service are legally binding on all users. By using Michi, you acknowledge and agree to all terms.
